race.comment: AARDIEBYTHESEASIDE NZ (11) is a quality mare who has improved with each start this time in, culminating in a third-up win at this circuit and distance last time out. Draws on the back row but she is race fit and up to winning again if things go her way. CAPTAINSHAVTIME NZ (2) kicked off her campaign with back-to-back wins at this venue then came from a wide barrier for third to Aardiebytheseaside last start, beaten only 1.3m. A good draw gives her a big chance to turn the tables. COPY CAT QUEEN (3) should be close to peak fitness and made it back-to-back seconds when coming from a similar draw to be edged out by Aardiebytheseaside last time. Peaking now so could go one better. Last season's Oaks winner FAKENIT (6) is good enough to win this with her A-game.
